final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing museum-style Chinese infographic illustration of 中国少数民族服饰, structured as a 文博图鉴 reference plate.

Style/medium: needs a 国家博物馆展板 / 历史服饰图鉴 aesthetic — exact illustration technique and rendering approach are yours
Composition: must follow this fixed layout: top header zone (主标题 + 副标题 + 导语), left structural exploded-view zone with 中文引线标注 and detail close-ups, upper-right materials/craftsmanship zone with texture swatches and annotations, mid-right pattern/color/symbolism zone with 主色板 + 纹样样本 + 文化解释, bottom dressing-sequence flowchart and 核心特征总结; central subject is a full-body standing figure in authentic ethnic costume if figure-appropriate, otherwise a centered structural exploded diagram
Subject: must include a representative 中国少数民族 costume subject — specific ethnic group, garment system, key structural components, material and craft details, pattern motifs, and color symbolism auto-selected for maximum representativeness and visual richness
Scene/backdrop: must include a paper-texture background in 米白 / 绢纸白 / 浅茶色 tones, no environmental scene
Lighting/mood: needs a neutral, archival, museum-display atmosphere — exact lighting treatment is yours
Color palette: must be anchored to the authentic color system of the selected ethnic costume; overall palette needs a restrained, scholarly, collectible direction — exact balance and accent ratios are yours
Materials/textures: must include realistic fabric texture swatches (embroidery, weave, metalwork, or dye as appropriate) rendered with material fidelity — exact grain and sheen level are yours
Text (verbatim): must include all annotation text in 简体中文: 主标题、副标题、导语、结构引线标注（关键部件名）、材质说明、纹样寓意说明、色彩含义说明、穿着顺序流程图文字、核心特征总结；所有文字必须为简体中文，清晰规整可读
Constraints: must preserve accurate garment structure and component relationships; all in-image text must be 简体中文 only — no English, no pinyin, no garbled characters; layout zones must all be present and legible; material and pattern depictions must reflect authentic craft, not decorative invention
Avoid: poster aesthetic, portrait-studio feel, e-commerce product-page feel, anime or illustration-cartoon style, cosplay feel, incorrect structural annotations, blurry or garbled text, fake or generic textures, over-decoration, excessive ornamental framing
